emails.body: FW: From The Enron India Newsdesk May 18 newsclips Tushar, Are you on the distribution list for these news clips? Paul To: Mathews, Leena

emails.subject: RE: From The Enron India Newsdesk - May 18 newsclips
emails.subject_base: From The Enron India Newsdesk - May 18 newsclips
emails.body: RE: From The Enron India Newsdesk May 18 newsclips Yes, Paul. Thanks. Any word today re lenders' action wrt termination notice? To: Dhruv, Tushar

emails.subject: RE: From The Enron India Newsdesk - May 18 newsclips
emails.subject_base: From The Enron India Newsdesk - May 18 newsclips
emails.body: Tushar, I only know what I read in the press. Sounds like they want to give the govt a little more time to come to their senses. Paul To: Y'Barbo, Paul
